steps.title: Track Max's desire
steps.content: The passage centers on Max's long-standing wish to visit La Reina: he has begged Papá to take him, imagines crossing the haunted gates, and hopes this summer will finally be the time.

steps.title: Reject unsupported purposes
steps.content: A invents a reluctance to grow up, B invents pride from Max's father, and D reverses Max's hopeful attitude toward summer. The passage instead shows Max's eagerness to visit the fortress. The answer is C.
